pageSubtitle: Select a case study below to see how our AI handles different industries and situations.
footnote: Note: This interaction is handled 100% by Lead Awaker AI. No human intervention required until intent is confirmed.

solarPanel.title: Solar Panel
solarPanel.heading: Example -<colored>Solar Panel Installation</colored>
solarPanel.description: Most solar quotes go cold because the buyer stalls on payback and roof orientation. Lead Awaker re-opens the thread, diagnoses the pain in euros, and books a roof-specific call where it matters.
solarPanel.additionalUseCases: Additional use cases for this niche: Photo collection of roof and meter, subsidy eligibility checks, automated pre-survey questionnaires, reminders to reduce no-show calls, and post-call follow-ups with personalized next steps.
solarPanel.agentProfile: Agent Speech Profile: Calm technical consultant. Direct, enthusiastic, and keeps momentum toward a booked assessment.

messages.content: Hi, Michael from Aviax Solar here. Quick check, is this the James who asked us for a solar estimate a while ago? 🙂

Thanks James. My manager asked me to follow up, but I didn't want to spam you.

Are you still aiming to reduce your monthly electricity cost this year?
Ok, roughly what are you paying per month right now, and has it increased over the last year?
€200/month is solid motivation, that's €2400 a year. Right now you're renting your electricity with no control over the price. Does that feel sustainable, or would you rather own the system?
owning makes more sense when you put it that way
but I am concerned about my main roof facing north, I heard it isnt ideal

That's the common concern.

Most people assume north-facing means "no," but pitch, shading, usable roof area, and whether we can use east or west sections can change the math. Our clients with similar bills typically see payback in 7-9 years.

Our main focus is personalization. We match panel layout and assumptions to your exact roof and usage so the payback estimate is realistic.

If we could confirm on a quick call whether you can hit a payback you feel good about, would that be worth it?
do you have examples of north-facing installations that worked out?

Absolutely. We've done dozens in your area. The specialist can show you similar projects with actual payback data and even connect you with a reference if you want. Would a quick call to see those examples work?
yes I'd like to see that

Perfect James, you're booked for Monday at 11:00 ✅

Our specialist will call you then to go through payback and your north-facing roof.
You are welcome and have a good day 🙂

gym.title: Gym Membership
gym.heading: Example -<colored>Gym Membership</colored>
gym.description: Most gym leads fade because motivation did, not because the gym was wrong. Lead Awaker re-opens the conversation, diagnoses why they stopped, and lines up a personal trainer plan that fits their life now.
gym.additionalUseCases: Additional use cases for this niche: Automated "missed workout" follow-ups, cancellation save sequences, reactivation offers triggered by time away, PT lead nurturing, and membership renewal reminders.
gym.agentProfile: Agent Speech Profile: Motivational coach. High empathy, high energy, and keeps momentum toward a next step.

messages.content: Hello, it's Sara from IronPulse Fitness Club here. Is this the same Mark who used to be a member with us a while back? 🙂

Nice! My calendar pinged me to call, but I didn't want to bug you.

Are you still looking to get back into training?
I would love to but I just got a baby and time is tight

Congrats on the baby! 🎉

Honestly, new parents who train smart tend to stick with it better because they need the energy boost. When you were with us before, what was your main goal?
Solid. What made you stop last time? Was it progress, motivation, or just life getting in the way?
I couldnt tell if I was improving

That's the worst, because then it feels like effort with no reward.

If you had clear proof each month that you're improving, would it be easier to stick with it?
yes, it is sort of a pattern with me, I start motivated but then it fizzles out

I hear you Mark.We do a monthly check-in so you can see progress clearly, and we adjust the plan fast. Let's book a quick personal trainer plan appointment so you and the PT can map out a realistic routine. Sound good?

Awesome, you're booked for Monday 4pm ✅

Jake will call you then. He's our go-to at habit systems and progress plans, especially for new parents.

If you need to reschedule, reply here.
You are welcome, have a good day 🙂

dental.title: Dental Clinic
dental.heading: Example -<colored>Dental Clinic</colored>
dental.description: Dental clinics lose patients to missed 6-month checkups and unfinished treatment plans. Lead Awaker re-opens the thread, handles price concerns, books the hygiene slot, and reschedules in natural language when life shifts.
dental.additionalUseCases: Additional use cases for this niche: Reminders for overdue checkups, follow-ups on open treatment estimates (implants, Invisalign, whitening), insurance-reset prompts in January, post-visit review requests, and birthday whitening offers.
dental.agentProfile: Agent Speech Profile: Warm front-desk coordinator. Reassuring, low-pressure, and focused on getting the patient on the calendar.

messages.content: Hi, Sophie from BrightSmile Dental here. Is this the same Laura who had a cosmetic consult with us about 8 months ago? 🙂

Thanks Laura. My colleague asked me to follow up, we opened a few hygiene slots this month for existing patients.

Are you overdue for a checkup, or still thinking about the whitening plan we talked about?
I know its time for a checkup but the whitening quote scared me a bit

Totally fair. Most people feel the same on the first quote.

Good news, your basisverzekering covers the checkup fully. For the whitening, we offer an interest-free plan up to 24 months, so it's much more manageable.
oh I didnt know about the plan
Quite common. Would it help if we booked the hygiene visit first, and the dentist talks you through the plan for 10 minutes at the same appointment? No extra cost.
Perfect. Here's the booking link: https://calendar.app.google

All set Laura, you're booked Thursday at 15:00 ✅

Dr. Ven will do the hygiene check and review the whitening plan with you.
I just realized I have a work thing thursday afternoon. can I push it to friday morning instead?
Of course. We have Friday at 09:30 or 11:00 open, which works better?

Done, moved to Friday 09:30 ✅

If anything else comes up, just message me here.

lawFirm.title: Law Firm
lawFirm.heading: Example -<colored>Law Firm</colored>
lawFirm.description: Car finance refund leads stall when they can't find the paperwork. Lead Awaker reactivates the lead, explains the DSAR process in plain language, and hands a ready-to-review case to a clerk.
lawFirm.additionalUseCases: Additional use cases for this niche: DSAR completion reminders, "30 working day" status updates, auto-escalation to a clerk when documents arrive, and reactivation campaigns for leads that started but did not finish.
lawFirm.agentProfile: Agent Speech Profile: Compliance-first admin. Clear, process-led, and low-pressure.

messages.content: Hi, this is Sophie from Sterling Finance. Is this Oliver who wanted to check whether they were owed a refund on their car finance?
Just bumping this up in case you got busy before :)
I would like to check. I had 2 cars on finance 5 years ago
That's great, Oliver. Do you happen to have your vehicle finance agreement documents handy for those cars?

No worries at all. We can submit a Data Subject Access Request (DSAR) on your behalf to retrieve those documents.

Could you please complete this short DSAR form by clicking this URL: https://www.dsarform.com
What is the process from here?
Do you let me know if I'm eligible once you retrieve the docs and then I confirm I want to proceed?

Absolutely. Once you complete the DSAR form, we request your agreement and review it. If we find you are eligible for a claim, we will get in touch to discuss next steps.

It typically takes around 30 working days to receive and review the documents. We operate on a no-win, no-fee basis, so there is no risk to you.

Form link: https://www.dsarform.com
Thanks for completing the form. You will hear from us soon. If you have any questions, feel free to ask 🙂
No, that is all from me
Ok Oliver, have a great day :)

coaching.title: Coaching
coaching.heading: Example -<colored>Career Transition Coaching</colored>
coaching.description: Career-transition coaches lose leads at the "am I ready to invest in myself" moment. Lead Awaker re-opens the conversation months later, surfaces what's really stuck, and turns cold clarity-call signups into paid discovery calls.
coaching.additionalUseCases: Additional use cases for this niche: Cohort or program waitlist nurturing, past-student referral asks, no-show follow-ups after discovery calls, re-engagement of leads who ghosted mid-application, and post-program upsell sequences.
coaching.agentProfile: Agent Speech Profile: Grounded, non-pushy mentor. Curious, reflective, and treats the lead's doubts as information, not objections.

messages.content: Hi, Maya from Threshold Coaching here. Is this the same Ellen who booked a free clarity call with us back in February? 🙂
sorry I never showed up, work was insane

No need to apologize, that's why I'm reaching out. My coach asked me to follow up because the people who ghost a clarity call are usually the ones who need it the most.

Still feeling stuck where you were, or did something shift?
still in HR and Im burned out
I keep dreaming of doing something with more meaning
That's a really common place to be, Ellen. When you picture "something with more meaning," what actually comes to mind?
maybe blue-collar workers? In HR I saw how little real support they get

That's a really specific niche, and honestly a really needed one. Most coaches aim at executives, so you'd be entering a much less crowded space.

What's been stopping you from starting?
and money. I dont want to quit HR until I know it can actually work

Exactly the right instinct. Our work with people in transition is structured around that, you stay employed while we build the coaching practice next to the day job, then transition only when the numbers work.

Would it help to spend 30 minutes with our head coach mapping what the first 6 months could actually look like for you?
yes I think I'm ready for that now
Great. Here's the booking link for a paid 30-min discovery: https://calendar.app.google

You're booked Thursday at 10:00 ✅

James will walk you through the transition framework and where coaching blue-collar workers fits in the market.
thank you Maya, this is the nudge I needed
That's why we reach out 🙂 Talk Thursday.
